results.title: Baltimore Therapist and Yoga Instructor Amanda Baker Launches You Amaze Me LLC and Alchemize Community to Redefine Mental Health Healing
results.description: Licensed clinical social worker Amanda Baker brings together yoga-based therapy, creative expression and community to offer a new path for people who feel left behind by traditional mental health care. BALTIMORE, Md., June 9, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Amanda Baker, a licensed clinical social...
